text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" Interceptor launches were observed.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness” 观察到拦截弹发射。

text: 🇾🇪 ⚠️ 🇺🇸 Abdul-Malik al-Houthi, leader of Yemen's Ansar Allah: "We will not remain neutral against any aggression towards Iran " ➡️ The current ceasefire is coming to an end; this ceasefire is very fragile and the likelihood of increased tensions is very high. ➡️ Our position is clear and public, and we are not neutral against the American-Israeli aggression targeting the Islamic Republic of Iran. ➡️ We are facing the Israeli enemy and its American partner; if the enemy returns to war, our path will also be to enter the war. ➡️ Even if the ceasefire remains stable, further rounds of conflict are inevitable because this ceasefire is only a pause in an ongoing battle. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇾🇪 ⚠️ 🇺🇸 也门安萨尔真主运动领导人阿卜杜勒-马利克·胡塞：“面对任何针对伊朗的侵略，我们绝不会保持中立。” ➡️ 目前的停火即将结束；这次停火非常脆弱，局势升级的可能性极高。 ➡️ 我们的立场明确且公开，面对针对伊朗伊斯兰共和国的美国-以色列侵略，我们绝不中立。 ➡️ 我们正面对以色列敌人及其美国伙伴；如果敌人重燃战火，我们的道路也将是参战。 ➡️ 即使停火保持稳定，后续的冲突也是不可避免的，因为这次停火只是持续战斗中的一个间歇。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇾🇪⚡️Leader of Ansar Allah in Yemen: 🔹 In some Persian Gulf countries, people are arrested and fined simply for posting a tweet in support of the Palestinian people. 🔹 By orders of security agencies, any solidarity with Hezbollah and the people of Lebanon…" 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Leader of Ansar Allah: We Will Not Remain Neutral Against Any Aggression Toward Iran 🔹 The current ceasefire is nearing its eend. It is highly fragile, and the possibility of escalating tensions is very high. 🔹 Our position is clear and public: we will not remain neutral in the face of any American-Israeli aggression targeting the Islamic Republic of Iran. 🔹 We are in confrontation with the Israeli enemy and its American partner. If the enemy returns to war, our path will also be entry into war. 🔹 Even if the ceasefire holds, future rounds of conflict are inevitable, because this ceasefire is only a pause in an ongoing battle. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇾🇪⚡️也门安萨尔真主运动领导人：🔹 在一些波斯湾国家，人们仅仅因为发布支持巴勒斯坦人民的推文就会被逮捕和罚款。🔹 根据安全机构的命令，任何对真主党和黎巴嫩人民的声援……” 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 安萨尔真主运动领导人：面对任何针对伊朗的侵略，我们绝不会保持中立 🔹 目前的停火即将结束。它非常脆弱，局势升级的可能性极高。 🔹 我们的立场明确且公开：面对任何针对伊朗伊斯兰共和国的美国-以色列侵略，我们绝不会保持中立。 🔹 我们正与以色列敌人及其美国伙伴进行对抗。如果敌人重燃战火，我们的道路也将是参战。 🔹 即使停火持续，未来的冲突也是不可避免的，因为这次停火只是持续战斗中的一个间歇。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Pakistan's Federal Minister for Information & Broadcasting Attaullah Tarar: The situation as it stands at 1930 PST 1. Formal response from Iranian side about confirmation of delegation to attend Islamabad Peace Talks is still "awaited". 2. Pakistan as the mediator is in constant touch with Iranians and pursuing the path of diplomacy and dialogue. 3. Ceasefire ends at 4:50 am PST, 22 April. Decision from Iran to attend the talks before the end of two weeks ceasefire is critical. 4. Pakistan has made sincere efforts to convince the Iranian leadership to participate in the second round of talks and these efforts continue. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 巴基斯坦联邦新闻与广播部长阿塔乌拉·塔拉尔：截至巴基斯坦标准时间19:30的局势：1. 伊朗方面关于确认出席伊斯兰堡和平会谈代表团的正式回复仍在“等待中”。2. 巴基斯坦作为调解方，正与伊朗保持密切联系，并寻求外交和对话途径。3. 停火将于4月22日巴基斯坦标准时间凌晨4:50结束。伊朗在两周停火结束前决定参加会谈至关重要。4. 巴基斯坦已做出真诚努力，说服伊朗领导层参加第二轮会谈，这些努力仍在继续。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: Since the start of the U.S. blockade against ships entering or exiting Iranian ports, U.S. forces have directed 28 vessels to turn around or return to port. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046608881602719756/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 CENTCOM：自美国封锁进出伊朗港口的船只以来，美军已指挥 28 艘船只掉头或返回港口。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046608881602719756/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command Since the start of the U.S. blockade against ships entering or exiting Iranian ports, U.S. forces have directed 28 vessels to turn around or return to port. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 自美国封锁进出伊朗港口的船只以来，美军已指挥 28 艘船只掉头或返回港口。推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF says its forces eliminated terrorists who violated the Lebanon ceasefire and posed an immediate threat. Golani Brigade units identified armed militants crossing the front defense line in the Al-Qasir area on both Monday night and Tuesday. The Air Force struck in all incidents. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军称其部队消灭了违反黎巴嫩停火协议并构成直接威胁的恐怖分子。戈兰尼旅部队在周一晚间和周二均发现武装分子越过了 Al-Qasir 地区的前沿防线。空军在所有事件中都进行了打击。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump voiced surprise that a vessel, likely the M/V Touska, that visited the Chinese port of Zhuhai, attempted to run the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. “We caught a ship yesterday that had some things on it, which wasn't very nice. A gift from China perhaps, I don't know. But I was a little surprised.” President Trump made these comments to CNBC during an interview this morning. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普对一艘曾访问中国珠海港、疑似为 M/V Touska 号的船只试图突破美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁表示惊讶。“我们昨天截获了一艘船，上面有一些东西，不太好。也许是来自中国的礼物，我不知道。但我感到有点惊讶。”特朗普总统今早接受 CNBC 采访时发表了上述评论。推文

text: Open Source Intel The UK communications regulator is investigating Telegram over alleged child sexual abuse content on the platform. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046606801907433695/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 英国通信监管机构正在调查 Telegram，原因是该平台上存在涉嫌儿童性虐待的内容。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046606801907433695/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 Pakistan's Information Minister, Ataullah Tarar: "Situation as of 19:30 (PST): 1. An official response from Iran confirming the delegation's participation in the Islamabad peace talks is still awaited. 2. Pakistan, as a mediator, is in constant contact with Iran and continues the path of diplomacy and dialogue. 3. The ceasefire will end on April 22 at 04:50 (PST). Iran's decision on whether to participate in the talks before the two-week ceasefire ends is critically important. 4. Pakistan has made sincere efforts to convince Iran's leadership to participate in the second round of talks, and these efforts are ongoing." tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 巴基斯坦新闻部长阿塔乌拉·塔拉尔（Ataullah Tarar）：“截至 19:30（巴基斯坦标准时间）的情况：1. 仍等待伊朗官方回应，确认代表团是否参加伊斯兰堡和平谈判。2. 巴基斯坦作为调解方，与伊朗保持密切联系，并继续外交和对话途径。3. 停火将于 4 月 22 日 04:50（巴基斯坦标准时间）结束。伊朗在两周停火结束前是否参加谈判的决定至关重要。4. 巴基斯坦已做出真诚努力，说服伊朗领导层参加第二轮谈判，这些努力仍在进行中。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump proposed a $1.5 trillion defense budget for FY2027, a 40%+ increase over last year and one of the largest jumps in modern U.S. history. Over $750 billion goes to weapons development and procurement. Priorities include major naval shipbuilding, F-35 and next-gen aircraft, the "Golden Dome" missile defense system, drones, AI, and munitions. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普提议 2027 财年国防预算为 1.5 万亿美元，比去年增长 40% 以上，是现代美国历史上增幅最大的预算之一。超过 7500 亿美元用于武器研发和采购。优先事项包括大型海军造船、F-35 和下一代飞机、“金穹”导弹防御系统、无人机、人工智能和弹药。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽Mexican President Sheinbaum was not aware of U.S. Embassy staff collaborating wih the State of Chihuahua, and her administration is asking ofr more information on the joint work between the two. "Well, first of all, we regret the death, because regardless…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 WaPo: The two U.S. embassy officials killed in a car crash alongside two Mexican officials in Chihuahua State worked for the CIA. They were returning from a meeting from a meeting with Mexican officials following a raid on a drug lab in a remote area of the state when, as Mexican officials describe, the car skidded off the road into a ravine and exploded. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽墨西哥总统辛鲍姆（Sheinbaum）不知道美国大使馆工作人员与奇瓦瓦州政府合作一事，她的政府正在要求了解更多关于双方联合工作的信息。“好吧，首先，我们对死亡表示遗憾，因为无论如何……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 《华盛顿邮报》：在奇瓦瓦州一起车祸中丧生的两名美国大使馆官员与两名墨西哥官员一同遇难，他们为中央情报局（CIA）工作。据墨西哥官员描述，他们在该州偏远地区突袭一个毒品实验室后，在与墨西哥官员会面返回途中，汽车滑出道路坠入峡谷并发生爆炸。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iran’s government spokesperson Fatemeh Mohajerani said the country has two strategies – war and diplomacy – both aimed at preserving national dignity and sovereignty. If the "enemy" attacks again, Iran will give a harder response than before. Defence forces are on full readiness. “We negotiate with our finger on the trigger,” she said. The negotiating team is complete, led by someone who was a field commander, knowledgeable in both battlefield and diplomacy. “The Iranian team will not compromise one iota on national interests,” she added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗政府发言人法特梅·穆哈杰拉尼（Fatemeh Mohajerani）表示，该国拥有两种战略——战争与外交——两者都旨在维护国家尊严和主权。如果“敌人”再次发动攻击，伊朗将做出比以往更强硬的回应。国防部队处于全面戒备状态。“我们扣动扳机进行谈判，”她说。谈判团队已组建完毕，由一名曾任战地指挥官、精通战场和外交的人员领导。“伊朗团队绝不会在国家利益上做出丝毫妥协，”她补充道。@wfwitness

text: 🇾🇪 ⚡️ Leader of Ansar Allah in Yemen: 🔹 In some Persian Gulf countries, people are arrested and fined simply for posting a tweet in support of the Palestinian people. 🔹 By orders of security agencies, any solidarity with Hezbollah and the people of Lebanon against Israeli aggression has been banned. 🔹 While praying against the enemy and condemning Zionist crimes has been prohibited, expressing loyalty to Israel and justifying its crimes is allowed — and even encouraged. 🔹 The enemies seek to impose absolute silence on the Islamic world and suppress any reaction against the oppression of America and Israel. 🔹 No matter how many crimes the Zionists commit, from Gaza to other parts of the Muslim world, even verbal criticism of them is not permitted in some Persian Gulf countries. 🔹 The suppression of voices showing solidarity with Palestine in some Persian Gulf countries has become worse than in America, Britain, and Europe. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇾🇪 ⚡️ 也门安萨尔真主运动（Ansar Allah）领导人：🔹 在一些波斯湾国家，人们仅仅因为发布支持巴勒斯坦人民的推文就会被逮捕和罚款。🔹 根据安全机构的命令，任何声援真主党和黎巴嫩人民反对以色列侵略的行为都被禁止。🔹 在禁止祈祷反对敌人和谴责犹太复国主义罪行的同时，表达对以色列的忠诚并为其罪行辩护却是被允许的——甚至受到鼓励。🔹 敌人试图在伊斯兰世界强加绝对的沉默，并压制任何反对美国和以色列压迫的反应。🔹 无论犹太复国主义者犯下多少罪行，从加沙到穆斯林世界的其他地区，在一些波斯湾国家，甚至连口头批评他们都是不允许的。🔹 在一些波斯湾国家，压制声援巴勒斯坦的声音的情况已经变得比美国、英国和欧洲还要糟糕。🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 UAE Minister of State Reem Al-Hashimy: "We are everything that they’re not" Absolutely, Iran is everything the UAE is not. Iran: a 3000+ year civilization, heir to one of humanity’s oldest continuous cultures. It built self-reliance — its own missiles, drones, and deterrence network. UAE: a young artificial state barely 55 years old. Before oil, poor tribal sheikhdoms under British protection. It used wealth to buy foreign security, bow to Western powers, normalize with the occupier, and chase luxury over dignity. And don’t forget, zero Iranian leaders in the Epstein files. The UAE’s elite? Swimming in them. From Dubai port kingpin Sultan Ahmed bin Sulayem appears thousands of times in explicit emails and “torture videos" to Emirati diplomat Hind Al-Owais exchanged hundreds of emails arranging “girls”. Iran built defiance with its own hands. The UAE built skyscrapers and traded its dignity for dirty secrets with a notorious p**ile financier. That’s 🇦🇪 “civilization.” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 阿联酋国务部长里姆·哈希米（Reem Al-Hashimy）：“我们拥有他们所没有的一切” 当然，伊朗拥有阿联酋所没有的一切。伊朗：拥有 3000 多年文明，是人类最古老连续文化之一的继承者。它建立了自力更生——拥有自己的导弹、无人机和威慑网络。阿联酋：一个成立仅 55 年的年轻人工国家。在石油发现之前，它是英国保护下的贫穷部落酋长国。它利用财富购买外国安全，向西方大国低头，与占领者关系正常化，追求奢华而非尊严。别忘了，爱泼斯坦名单中没有伊朗领导人。阿联酋的精英呢？他们深陷其中。从迪拜港口大亨苏尔坦·艾哈迈德·本·苏莱姆（Sultan Ahmed bin Sulayem）在露骨邮件和“酷刑视频”中出现数千次，到阿联酋外交官欣德·阿尔·奥瓦伊斯（Hind Al-Owais）交换了数百封安排“女孩”的邮件。伊朗用自己的双手建立了反抗。阿联酋建造了摩天大楼，并用尊严换取了与臭名昭著的恋童癖金融家的肮脏秘密。这就是 🇦🇪 “文明”。🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: “I Would Have Won Vietnam Very Quickly – During CNBC Squawk Box Interview NOTE: He AVOIDED draft five times during the Vietnam war. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：“我会很快赢得越南战争” —— 在CNBC《财经论谈》节目采访中。注：他在越南战争期间曾五次逃避征兵。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 : Tarar Attaullah, Pakistani Minister for Information and Broadcasting - no formal confirmation of Iran sending a delegation to Islamabad talks yet. " The situation as it stands at 1930 PST 1. Formal response from Iranian side about confirmation of delegation to attend Islamabad Peace Talks is still awaited. 2. ⁠Pakistan as the mediator is in constant touch with Iranians and pursuing the path of diplomacy and dialogue. 3. Ceasefire ends at 4:50 am PST, 22 April. Decision from Iran to attend the talks before the end of two weeks ceasefire is critical. 4. ⁠Pakistan has made sincere efforts to convince the Iranian leadership to participate in the second round of talks and these efforts continue. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ：巴基斯坦新闻与广播部长塔拉尔·阿塔乌拉（Tarar Attaullah）表示，目前尚未正式确认伊朗是否会派遣代表团参加伊斯兰堡会谈。“截至巴基斯坦标准时间19:30的情况：1. 仍等待伊朗方面关于确认派遣代表团参加伊斯兰堡和平会谈的正式回复。2. 作为调解方的巴基斯坦正与伊朗保持密切联系，并寻求外交与对话途径。3. 停火协议将于4月22日巴基斯坦标准时间凌晨4:50结束。伊朗在两周停火期结束前决定是否参加会谈至关重要。4. 巴基斯坦已做出真诚努力说服伊朗领导层参加第二轮会谈，这些努力仍在继续。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 AP: A new Pentagon budget request would triple spending on drone technology, reflecting the growing importance of unmanned systems in modern warfare. The proposal includes tens of billions of dollars for drones and counter-drone systems as the US military seeks to expand capabilities. Officials say the shift is driven by lessons from recent conflicts, where drones have become a central battlefield tool. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美联社：五角大楼的一项新预算请求将使无人机技术的支出增加两倍，反映出无人系统在现代战争中日益增长的重要性。该提案包括数百亿美元用于无人机和反无人机系统，因为美军正寻求扩大作战能力。官员们表示，这一转变是由近期冲突的经验教训所驱动的，在这些冲突中，无人机已成为核心战场工具。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🐻 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf with another based post on X - this time a poll on how the Orangetan Window Licker will sell the restart of the war to imperial pleb. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🐻 伊朗议会发言人穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫在 X 上发布了另一条基于事实的帖子——这次是一项民意调查，询问那个“红毛舔窗者”将如何向帝国平民兜售重启战争的计划。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Iranian MP Ahmad Naderi: "The naval blockade is the last malice of the Americans. The blockade will fail and we will take revenge for what they did to the Iranian ship yesterday. Collection of tolls in the Strait of Hormuz will be in riyals and the tolls will be fixed. The U.S. and the countries that support it will have to pay reparations." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗议员艾哈迈德·纳德里：“海上封锁是美国人的最后恶意。封锁将会失败，我们将为他们昨天对伊朗船只所做的一切进行报复。霍尔木兹海峡的通行费将以里亚尔结算，且通行费将是固定的。美国及其支持国将不得不支付赔偿金。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon's military court released two Hezbollah detainees on bail of 100 million Lebanese lira (~$1,100 each), held since March 4. With this, the court has now released all Hezbollah detainees brought before it. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩军事法庭以每人 1 亿黎巴嫩镑（约 1100 美元）的保释金释放了两名自 3 月 4 日起被拘留的真主党成员。至此，法庭已释放了所有被带到其面前的真主党被拘留者。 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Japanese Type 10 tank shell detonated inside the turret during training. Three soldiers killed, one seriously injured. Cause unknown. Japan has suspended live-fire drills pending investigation. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046600244658397565/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：日本一辆 10 式坦克在训练期间炮塔内发生炮弹爆炸。三名士兵死亡，一人重伤。原因不明。日本已暂停实弹演习，等待调查。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046600244658397565/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇲🇽 🇺🇸 The two U.S. officials killed in the car crash in northern Mexico's Chihuahua State on Sunday have been identified as CIA officers, raising questions about Washington’s role in Mexico’s fight against drug cartels, NYT reports. ➡️ The officers died alongside two Mexican security officials, including the director of the state's investigation agency, while returning from a military-led operation targeting clandestine meth labs in Chihuahua. repost, like, and comment on the posts at @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇲🇽 🇺🇸 据《纽约时报》报道，周日在墨西哥北部奇瓦瓦州车祸中丧生的两名美国官员已被确认为中央情报局（CIA）特工，这引发了人们对华盛顿在墨西哥打击贩毒集团斗争中所扮演角色的质疑。➡️ 这些特工在从奇瓦瓦州一次针对秘密冰毒实验室的军事行动中返回时，与两名墨西哥安全官员（包括该州调查局局长）一同丧生。转发、点赞并评论 @visionergeo 的帖子 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 The IDF delivered a new statue to the Christian community in southern Lebanon, replacing one that was vandalized. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046599282287894624/photo/1 The IDF soldier who smashed a statue of Jesus with a sledgehammer in southern Lebanon has been dismissed from combat duty and sentenced to 30 days in jail. The soldier who filmed him received the same punishment. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046598586834546830/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：新消息 🔴 以色列国防军向黎巴嫩南部的基督教社区交付了一尊新雕像，以替换一尊被破坏的雕像。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046599282287894624/photo/1 在黎巴嫩南部用大锤砸毁耶稣雕像的以色列国防军士兵已被开除战斗职务，并被判处 30 天监禁。拍摄他的士兵受到了同样的惩罚。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046598586834546830/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Sayyed Mohammad Marandi, a member of Iran’s negotiating team, wrote on X: “Everyone must immediately leave the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, and Kuwait. Also, all sailors on ships in the Persian Gulf must prepare to abandon their vessels. This is especially urgent for ships near the Strait of Hormuz, which will be the first to be destroyed. Time is running out.” tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗谈判小组成员赛义德·穆罕默德·马兰迪在 X 上写道：“每个人都必须立即离开阿拉伯联合酋长国、卡塔尔、巴林、沙特阿拉伯和科威特。此外，波斯湾所有船只上的水手必须准备弃船。对于靠近霍尔木兹海峡的船只来说，这一点尤其紧迫，因为它们将首当其冲被摧毁。时间不多了。” 推文

text: WarTranslated This night, SBU drones struck the "Samara" oil station, which processes Russia's primary export grade, Urals. This facility is a critical component of the Russian Federation's oil transportation infrastructure. According to preliminary reports, the SBU drones damaged five crude oil reservoirs, each with a capacity of 20,000 cubic meters. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：今晚，乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）的无人机袭击了“萨马拉”石油站，该站处理俄罗斯的主要出口等级原油——乌拉尔原油。该设施是俄罗斯联邦石油运输基础设施的关键组成部分。据初步报告，SBU 无人机损坏了五个原油储罐，每个储罐的容量为 20,000 立方米。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Houthi leader Abdul-Malik al-Houthi accused Gulf states of restricting online solidarity and public prayers for Palestinians, while blaming Jews for the pressure. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046597809516753360/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：胡塞武装领导人阿卜杜勒-马利克·胡塞指责海湾国家限制在线声援和为巴勒斯坦人进行公开祈祷，同时将压力归咎于犹太人。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046597809516753360/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Pakistan’s Information Minister Attaullah Tarar says a formal response from Iran confirming participation in the Islamabad peace talks is still awaited. He states the ceasefire is set to end at “4:50 am PST on April 22,” adding that Iran’s decision before the deadline is critical. Tarar says Pakistan remains in constant contact with Iranian officials and continues efforts to secure participation in the next round of talks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦新闻部长阿塔乌拉·塔拉尔表示，目前仍在等待伊朗方面确认参加伊斯兰堡和平谈判的正式回复。他表示停火协议定于“4 月 22 日巴基斯坦标准时间凌晨 4:50”结束，并补充说伊朗在截止日期前的决定至关重要。塔拉尔表示，巴基斯坦与伊朗官员保持着密切联系，并继续努力确保其参加下一轮会谈。 @wfwitness

text: Trump proposed a $1.5 trillion defense budget for FY2027, a dramatic increase of roughly 40%+ over the previous year and one of the largest jumps in modern U.S. history. More than $750 billion of that total is concentrated in weapons development and procurement, especially advanced systems. The plan prioritizes a major expansion of naval shipbuilding (including dozens of new vessels and submarines), continued investment in fighter jets like the F-35 and next-generation aircraft, and funding for the “Golden Dome” missile defense system. The budget also significantly boosts spending on drones, AI, munitions, and military infrastructure, alongside increases in troop pay and industrial capacity (such as shipyards and critical minerals).
text_zh: 特朗普提议 2027 财年的国防预算为 1.5 万亿美元，比上一年大幅增加了约 40% 以上，是现代美国历史上增幅最大的预算之一。总额中超过 7500 亿美元集中在武器开发和采购上，特别是先进系统。该计划优先考虑大规模扩大海军造船（包括数十艘新舰艇和潜艇）、继续投资 F-35 等战斗机和下一代飞机，以及为“金穹”导弹防御系统提供资金。该预算还显著增加了在无人机、人工智能、弹药和军事基础设施方面的支出，同时提高了士兵薪酬和工业能力（如造船厂和关键矿产）。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf posts a poll asking “they’ll sell war to make what great again?” The post criticises US political messaging and economic conditions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗议会发言人卡利巴夫发布了一项民意调查，询问“他们会通过兜售战争来让什么再次伟大？”该帖子批评了美国的政治信息传递和经济状况。 @wfwitness

text: New poll from Iran's Ghalibaf.
text_zh: 来自伊朗卡利巴夫的新民调。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Sources to Al-Jadeed: The Lebanese military court has decided to release two Hezbollah members on bail of 100 million Lebanese lira (approximately $1,170) each, after they had been detained since March 4. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 消息人士向 Al-Jadeed 透露：黎巴嫩军事法庭决定以每人 1 亿黎巴嫩镑（约 1170 美元）的保释金释放两名自 3 月 4 日起被拘留的真主党成员。 @wfwitness

text: Pakistan’s Information Minister: Formal response from Iranian side about confirmation of delegation to attend Islamabad Peace Talks is still awaited. Ceasefire ends at 4:50 am PST, 22 April. Decision from Iran to attend the talks before the end of two weeks ceasefire is critical. Pakistan has made sincere efforts to convince the Iranian leadership to participate in the second round of talks and these efforts continue.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦新闻部长：仍在等待伊朗方面关于确认代表团参加伊斯兰堡和平谈判的正式回复。停火协议于 4 月 22 日巴基斯坦标准时间凌晨 4:50 结束。伊朗在两周停火结束前决定参加会谈至关重要。巴基斯坦已做出真诚努力说服伊朗领导层参加第二轮会谈，这些努力仍在继续。

text: Obama: We don't have rulers, we don't have kings or monarchs or aristocracies. We have citizens.
text_zh: 奥巴马：我们没有统治者，我们没有国王、君主或贵族。我们有公民。

text: China's Foreign Ministry on Japan: Japan’s actions are an evasion of historical responsibility. Amnesia of history means betrayal. Denial of responsibility spells a repetition of crimes. Will Japan reflect on its past — or distort it? History’s verdict cannot be rewritten. The international community will remain on high alert. New militarism will never be allowed to spread. Such moves will meet a firm response. Peace-loving nations will not tolerate historical revisionism. What is Japan really up to? How can it present itself as a peace-loving country?
text_zh: 中国外交部谈日本：日本的行为是在逃避历史责任。忘记历史意味着背叛。否认责任意味着重蹈覆辙。日本会反思过去，还是歪曲过去？历史的判决不容改写。国际社会将保持高度警惕。绝不允许新军国主义抬头。此类举动将遭到坚决回应。爱好和平的国家不会容忍历史修正主义。日本到底想干什么？它怎么能把自己标榜为爱好和平的国家？

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 IDF announced that the Israeli soldier who smashed a statue of Jesus with a sledgehammer in southern Lebanon, along with another soldier who documented the act, have been removed from combat roles and sentenced to 30 days in jail. @wtwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 IDF installed a new statue of Jesus to replace the one that had been damaged . @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，那名在黎巴嫩南部用大锤砸毁耶稣雕像的以色列士兵，以及另一名记录该行为的士兵，已被调离战斗岗位，并被判处30天监禁。@wtwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军安装了一座新的耶稣雕像，以替换受损的那座。@wfwitness

text: China's Foreign Ministry on Japan relaxing the restrictions on defense equipment exports: China is gravely concerned over this. Several instruments explicitly stipulated that Japan should be completely disarmed and shall not maintain industries that would enable its rearmament. The Japanese Constitution also imposes strict restrictions on the country's military strength, the right of belligerency, and the right to wage wars. Japan's recent dangerous moves in military and security fields have debunked its self-proclaimed labels as a peaceful nation and adherence to the exclusively defense-oriented principle. Many experts worry that Japan is restarting its war machine. Japan's accelerated remilitarization is a fact and reality supported by concrete plans and actions. The international community, including China, will remain highly vigilant and firmly resist Japan's reckless moves towards new militarism.
text_zh: 中国外交部就日本放宽防卫装备出口限制回应：中方对此表示严重关切。多项文件明确规定，日本应彻底解除武装，不得保留能够使其重新武装的工业。日本宪法也对该国的军事力量、交战权和战争权施加了严格限制。日本近期在军事和安全领域的危险举动，戳穿了其自诩为和平国家和坚持“专守防卫”原则的标签。许多专家担心日本正在重启战争机器。日本加速再军事化是一个有具体计划和行动支持的事实。包括中国在内的国际社会将保持高度警惕，坚决抵制日本走向新军国主义的鲁莽行径。

text: Japanese Type 10 tank shell exploded inside the turret during training in Japan. 3 soldiers killed, 1 seriously injured. Cause unknown, live-fire drills suspended pending investigation.
text_zh: 日本一辆10式坦克在训练期间炮弹在炮塔内爆炸。造成3名士兵死亡，1人重伤。原因不明，实弹演习已暂停，等待调查。

text: A 16-year-old Palestinian boy was killed after being hit by a vehicle near Hebron. The car is linked to Israeli ministerial security, possibly tied to Itamar Ben-Gvir, but his office denies involvement. Palestinians call it a deliberate killing.
text_zh: 一名16岁巴勒斯坦男孩在希伯伦附近被车辆撞击后身亡。该车与以色列部长级安保部门有关，可能与伊塔马尔·本-格维尔有关，但其办公室否认参与。巴勒斯坦人称这是一起蓄意杀人事件。

text: NEW: Zelensky says Ukraine repaired the Druzhba oil pipeline after a Russian strike. The pipeline is now ready to resume operations.
text_zh: 最新消息：泽连斯基表示，乌克兰已修复了在俄罗斯袭击后受损的“友谊”输油管道。该管道现已准备好恢复运营。

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Space Force has cameras on every inch of the 3 sites that were so brilliantly hit last June! Trump: "Never allow the Traitor Democrats like Low IQ person Hakeem Jeffries, or Cryin’ Chuck Schumer, or the totally corrupt Fake News Media such as the phony and decaying Wall Street Journal, the Failing New York Times (Subscriptions way down!), or dying “60 Minutes,” to demean or criticize Operation Midnight Hammer, which totally obliterated the Nuclear Dust locations to the point where bloodthirsty Iran has been unable to get to it, or dig it out." "Space Force has cameras on every inch of the 3 sites that were so brilliantly hit last June!" - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：太空军在去年6月被极其出色地打击的3个地点，每一寸土地上都装有摄像头！特朗普：“绝不允许像低智商人士哈基姆·杰弗里斯（Hakeem Jeffries）、爱哭鬼查克·舒默（Chuck Schumer），或者像虚伪且腐朽的《华尔街日报》、失败的《纽约时报》（订阅量大幅下降！）或垂死的《60分钟》节目这样完全腐败的假新闻媒体，去贬低或批评‘午夜之锤’行动（Operation Midnight Hammer），该行动彻底摧毁了核尘埃地点，以至于嗜血的伊朗无法接近或挖掘它。”“太空军在去年6月被极其出色地打击的3个地点，每一寸土地上都装有摄像头！” - 开源情报推文

text: WarTranslated The Russians dropped FAB bombs on Sloviansk twice overnight. A school was destroyed, and 18 apartment buildings, 3 private houses, 4 shops, and a pharmacy were damaged. 3 people were injured. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046591887205609508/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯人昨晚两次向斯洛维扬斯克投掷FAB炸弹。一所学校被毁，18栋公寓楼、3栋私人住宅、4家商店和一家药店受损。3人受伤。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046591887205609508/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Due to Starlink being blocked, the Russians have been set back a century and are now manually laying internet cables to each position. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046590287716225335/photo/1 tweet
